title: Vegan Ukrainian-Style Cabbage Wrap Filling
description: A flavorful and refreshing vegan filling inspired by Ukrainian cuisine, served in a crunchy light wrap.
instructions: Shred the cabbage and set aside.
In a large pan, heat the sesame oil over medium heat.
Add the shredded cabbage and cook for 5 minutes.
Stir in the floral rice vinegar and cook for another minute.
Warm the light wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wraps by spooning the cabbage mixture onto the center of each wrap.
Optional: Add your favorite vegan toppings, such as sliced cucumbers or pickled carrots.
